description: Шаблон для документации: Getting Started, API Reference, CLI Commands, Configuration, Migration Guides.
sections: Overview — brief intro paragraph defining scope and purpose
Prerequisites / Setup — runtime versions, tools needed, environment config
Getting Started — step-by-step first run instructions
API Reference — endpoints/commands grouped by resource with request/response examples
Configuration — env vars, config files, feature flags
Deployment — build steps, CI/CD, monitoring (if applicable)
Migration Guides — version upgrades, breaking changes (when relevant)
See Also — crosslinks к wiki/entities/ и wiki/concepts/

navigation_pattern.footer_section: ## See Also — с crosslink к wiki/entities/ и wiki/concepts/
navigation_pattern.first_page_note: Первая страница docs-index.md имеет только 'Back to Index' link
navigation_pattern.last_page_note: Последняя страница имеет только '← Previous Topic' link
